title: Foo Bar Consumer Lag Fix
description: Diagnose and fix a Kafka consumer that cannot keep up with producer throughput. Consumer lag is growing; optimize batch size, parallelism, or fetch config so the sink table catches up.

tasks.description: Tune the consumer so it processes messages fast enough; analytics.events_sink should eventually contain the expected row count.

infrastructure.description: Redpanda with events topic (10k messages). ClickHouse with analytics.events_sink. Consumer is misconfigured (single-thread, tiny batch) and lags.
